## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Chore (dependency updates, CI/CD tweaks, refactoring, documentation)

## Quality & Compliance Checklist
- [ ] My commits are GPG-signed (`git commit -S`); the repository requires verifiable signatures on every commit.
- [ ] **FLA-2.1 signature:** I have signed the FSFE Fiduciary License Agreement 2.1 via [CLA-assistant](https://cla-assistant.io/vegstylecio/.github) on a prior PR, or I accept that the bot will prompt me to sign on this PR before it can be merged.
- [ ] My branch has a linear history (squash or rebase, no merge commits).
- [ ] I have included the organization's license header (SPDX) in all new source files.
- [ ] I have run the appropriate formatting and linting tools for this repository.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests to cover my changes.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation and version/changelog files if required.
- [ ] All CI status checks (Fast Check / Release Pre-Merge Gate) pass.
